meaning: To cancel means to decide that an event or a request will not happen.

meaning: A driveway is a short private road that leads to a person’s home.
example: The long driveway led us to their new house.

meaning: Garbage is waste material like unwanted or spoiled food, bottles, paper, etc.
example: The boy cleaned up the garbage around his house.

meaning: An instrument is something designed to do a certain task like music.
example: My favorite musical instrument is the piano.

meaning: A list is a record of information printed with an item on each line.
example: My mom makes a list of groceries to buy.

meaning: Magic is the power to do impossible things.
example: The magician used magic to pull a rabbit out of his hat.

meaning: A message is a set of words that you send to someone.
example: I left a message for you in the envelope.

meaning: To notice something is to see it for the first time.
example: Did you notice the view?

meaning: To own something means to have it. That thing belongs to you.
example: My grandfather owns that house.

meaning: To predict something is to say that it will happen.
example: She predicted that I would get married next year.

meaning: A professor is a person who teaches in college.
example: Mike’s science professor knows a lot about physics.

meaning: To rush is to go somewhere or do something very quickly.
example: Nancy rushed to finish her homework.

meaning: A schedule is a plan that tells you when to do things.
example: What is your class schedule for today?

meaning: To share something is to give some of it to another person.
example: Jimmy shared his apple with me.

meaning: A stage is a place where actors or musicians act or sing.
example: A large screen was on the stage.

meaning: A storm is very bad weather. There is a lot of rain or snow.
example: Did that storm wake you up last night?

meaning: You use within to say that something is inside another thing.
example: Within the box, there was a pizza.

meaning: To advertise is to tell people about something on TV, radio, etc.
example: They used a rabbit to help them advertise their product.

meaning: To assign something to someone is to tell them to do it.
example: I assigned the worker an important task.

meaning: An audience is a group of people who watch something together.
example: There was a large audience at the game.

meaning: Breakfast is the first meal of the day.
example: I eat breakfast at 8:00 every morning.

meaning: A competition is a contest to see who is the best at something.
example: He won the running competition over the weekend.

meaning: If the weather is cool, it is a little bit cold.
example: The weather is cool in the fall.

meaning: If you gain something, you get more of it.
example: I gained some weight over the summer.

meaning: Importance means the quality or condition of being needed or valued.

meaning: Knowledge is information that you have about something.
example: A music teacher should have good knowledge of music.

meaning: If something is major, it is big or important.
example: I have a major problem. My boss wants me to redo my project!

meaning: Mean describes someone who is unkind or cruel.
example: My co-worker is a very mean person. He gets angry very quickly.

meaning: If you prefer something, you want it more than something else.
example: I prefer to take the path that will lead me to a bright future.

meaning: A president is the leader of a country.
example: The president of our country made an important announcement.

meaning: Progress is the act of getting closer to doing or finishing something.
example: Our company made financial progress this year.

meaning: Respect is a good opinion of someone because they are good.
example: I have great respect for firemen.

meaning: Ifyou are rich, you have a lot of money.
example: He’s rich. He can buy anything he wants.

meaning: A skill is the knowledge and ability that allows you to do something well.
example: A snowboarder must have the right skills to do well.

meaning: Somehow means in a way or by some means which is not known.
example: He somehow had to find a way to reach the life preserver.

meaning: Strength is the physical power that you have.
example: Exercising will increase your strength and give you more power.

meaning: To vote is to officially choose between two or more things.
example: I voted for Billy to be our class president.

meaning: If something is above, it is at a higher level than something else.
example: He straightened the sign that was above the crowd.

meaning: If something is ahead of something else, it is in front of it.
example: The blue car drove on ahead of us.

meaning: An amount is how much there is of something.
example: Can I use my card to pay for the entire amount?

meaning: A belief is a strong feeling that something is correct or true.
example: A preacher or priest should have a strong belief in God.

meaning: The center of something is the middle of it.
example: The center of a dart board is the most important spot.

meaning: If something is common, it happens often or there is much of it.
example: It is common for snow to fall in the winter.

meaning: To cost is to require expenditure or payment.
example: These designer shoes cost more than the regular ones.

meaning: To demonstrate something is to show how it is done.
example: She demonstrated her plan to her co-workers.

meaning: Different describes someone or something that is not the same as others.
example: Each of my sisters has a different hair style from one another.

meaning: Evidence is a fact or thing that you use to prove something.
example: He used the pictures as evidence that UFOs are real.

meaning: Honesty means the quality of being truthful or honest.
example: A courtroom should be a place of honesty.

meaning: An idiom is a phrase with a meaning different from its words.
example: The idiom “when pigs fly” means that something will never happen.

meaning: If something is independent, it is not controlled by something else.
example: She chose to live an independent life in the country.

meaning: Inside means the inner part, space or side of something.
example: The inside of the box was empty.

meaning: A master is a person who is very good at something.
example: My brother is a master of taekwondo.

meaning: A memory is something you remember.
example: The memory of my first time in the city will always be the best.

meaning: If something is proper, it is right.
example: It is not proper to throw your garbage on the road.

meaning: To scan something is to look at it very carefully.

meaning: A section is a part of something larger.
example: The green section of the graph is the most important part.

meaning: The surface of something is the top part or outside of it.

meaning: When a person is anxious, they worry that something bad will happen.

meaning: When something is awful, it is very bad.
example: Her performance last night was awful.

meaning: To consist of is to be made of parts or things.
example: Today’s choices for lunch consisted of pizza, hamburgers, and hot dogs.

meaning: To desire is to want something.
example: My sister desires a big house and lots of money.

meaning: When a person is eager about something, they are excited about it.
example: The man was eager to talk about the good news.

meaning: A household is all the people who live in one house.
example: Our household is made up of my father, my mother and me.

meaning: An intent is a plan to do something.
example: Her intent is to visit Italy next summer.

meaning: A landscape is how an area of land looks.
example: The landscape of the country is very green.

meaning: To lift something is to move it higher.
example: The man tried to lift the box.

meaning: To load is to put objects into something.
example: The man loaded the boxes into a truck.

meaning: A lung is the organ in the body that fills with air when breathing.

meaning: A motion is a movement that someone makes.
example: The police officer made a motion with his hand.

meaning: The pace of something is the speed at which it happens.
example: I ran the race at a slower pace than my friend.

meaning: When someone is polite, they are acting in a thoughtful way.
example: The boy was very polite: he behaved very thoughtfully.

meaning: To possess something is to have it or own it.
example: My uncle possesses three sheep, a chicken, a cow and a dog.

meaning: When something happens rapidly, it happens very fast.
example: The train moved rapidly on the tracks.

meaning: To remark is to say something.
example: The teacher remarked on how quickly the students were learning.

meaning: To seek is to look for something.
example: If I have a problem, I seek my sister’s advice.

meaning: To shine is to make a bright light.
example: The candles are shining in the dark room.

meaning: To spill is to have something fall out of its container.
example: I spilled the coffee on the table.

meaning: To bring means to take someone or something to a person or place.
example: Oscar will bring in all the boxes.

meaning: A castle is a building with strong walls where royalty usually lives.
example: The castle was built many years ago.

meaning: To command someone is to tell them to do something.
example: The general commanded his army to attack.

meaning: To counsel someone is to listen and give advice about a problem.
example: The teacher counseled the girl about her troubles.

meaning: To ensure is to make certain that something happens.
example: Eating good food ensures that we stay healthy.

meaning: An explosion is a violent burst, usually with a loud sound.

meaning: Jewelry is something that people wear like earrings or necklaces.

meaning: To land means to come to the ground usually from a ship or aircraft.
example: The parachutist landed safely on the ground.

meaning: A meteor is a rock from outer space that falls to Earth.
example: We saw a meteor in the sky last night.

meaning: A monster is any imaginary frightening creature that looks strange.
example: The monster scared everyone in the village.

meaning: If something is northern, it is in the direction of north.
example: It is much colder in northern countries than it is here.

meaning: If something is remote, it is very far away and difficult to get to.
example: It took many days to get to the remote island.

meaning: If something is southern, it is in the direction of south.
example: Taegu is located in the southern part of the Korean peninsula.

meaning: A statue is an image of a person or animal made of stone or metal.
example: I saw a beautiful statue of a lion today.

meaning: Steam is water that has become hot and has turned into a misty gas.
example: We could see the steam rise from the boiling water.

meaning: To submit to someone is to agree to do what they tell you to do.
example: She submitted to her mother’s wishes and did her homework.

meaning: A temple is a building that is used for religious purposes.
example: The people visited the temple to pray.

meaning: Upper means higher in position or place.
example: A home’s attic is at the upper part of the structure.

meaning: A weed is a plant, especially one that is not useful or wanted.
example: The yard of the house was full of ugly weeds.

meaning: A wing is the part of an animal that lets it fly.
example: The bird used its wings to fly across the water.

meaning: An arrow is a thin, straight stick shot from a bow.
example: The arrow flew through the air and hit the target.

meaning: A battle is a fight between two armies during a war.
example: The battle lasted for many days.

meaning: A bow is a weapon made of curved wood and string that shoots arrows.
example: He went hunting with a bow and arrow.

meaning: When people are brave, they are not afraid to face pain or danger.

meaning: A chief is the leader of a group of people.
example: The chief led the people through the mountains.

meaning: A disadvantage is a situation where someone is likely to lose.

meaning: An enemy is a country that is fighting another country during a war.

meaning: An entrance is a place where someone can enter an area.

meaning: If something hardly happens, it almost does not happen at all.

meaning: To intend to do something means to plan to do it.
example: I intend to finish college in three years.

meaning: Laughter is the sound produced by laughing about something funny.

meaning: A log is a thick piece of wood that is cut from a tree.

meaning: The military is the armed forces of a country.
example: I joined the military after I finished high school.

meaning: To obey means to follow what a law or a person says you must do.

meaning: To secure something means to get it after a lot of effort.

meaning: When someone or something is steady, they are under control.
example: The problem was hard but she remained steady and solved it.

meaning: To trust is to believe that someone is honest and will do what is right.
example: I trust my friends; they don’t tell my secrets to other people.

meaning: To twist something is to wrap it around itself or another thing.

meaning: Unless means if not or except when.
example: Unless you clean your room, you cannot play with your friends.

meaning: A weapon is an object that can be used to hurt people.

meaning: The chest is the front part of a person’s body under the neck.
example: The water in the lake was as high as my chest.

meaning: If you have confidence about something, you are sure of it.
example: I have confidence that I did well on the test.

meaning: A consequence is a result of a choice or action.
example: Asa consequence of missing my bus, I had to find another way to work.

meaning: A disaster is a really bad thing that happens.
example: When the car crashed, it was a disaster.

meaning: To disturb someone means to upset them.
example: The loud noise disturbed me while I was working.

meaning: To estimate something means to make a guess about it.

meaning: When you honor people or things, you show respect for them.

meaning: To impress someone means to make that person proud.
example: He was able to impress the girls with his new dance.

meaning: A marathon is a very long foot race just over 42 kilometers.
example: I ran a marathon, and now my legs are tired.

meaning: When something is narrow, it is very thin.
example: The bridge is too narrow for a car to drive over.

meaning: When something is pale, it does not have a bright color.
example: The girl’s skin was very pale.

meaning: When something is rough, it is not even or smooth.
example: The rough ground hurt my feet.

meaning: To satisfy someone means to make them happy.

meaning: To scream means to make a loud noise with your mouth.

meaning: When someone or something is sensitive, they are easily hurt.

meaning: The shade is a dark area that something makes when it blocks the sun.

meaning: To supplement something is to add something else to it in a good way.

meaning: When someone feels terror, they are scared.

meaning: A threat is something bad that might happen.

meaning: A victim is a person that had something bad happen to them.
example: I was a victim of a robbery.

meaning: An ancestor is a family member from the past.
example: My ancestors came from Germany.

meaning: An angle is the direction from which you look at something.
example: The giraffe turned its head to see from another angle.

meaning: A boot is a heavy shoe that goes over your ankle.
example: He wore boots so that his feet wouldn’t get wet.

meaning: A border is the edge of an area.
example: The postcard had a pretty green border of pine needles.

meaning: To congratulate someone is to tell them that you are happy for them.
example: Bill and Angela congratulated each other on a job well done.

meaning: A frame is a border for a picture or mirror.

meaning: Heaven is the place that some people believe people go when they die.

meaning: A legend is a story from the past.

meaning: To praise is to show that you like someone or something.
example: The coach praised both athletes after a good practice.

meaning: To proceed is to go in a certain direction.

meaning: If something is pure, it is very clear and beautiful.
example: The rose was pure. It had no dirt or imperfections.

meaning: A relative is a family member.

meaning: If one is senior, they are the oldest or have been there the longest.

meaning: If someone or something is silent, they make no sound.
example: Since no one was home, the house was silent.

meaning: If someone or something is superior, they are better than another.

meaning: If something is thick, it is wide and solid.

meaning: To wrap is to cover something on all sides.

meaning: If someone goes or travels abroad, they go to another country.

meaning: To anger someone is to make them mad.

meaning: A bride is a woman who is getting married or has just gotten married.

meaning: If something is brief, it only lasts fora short time.

meaning: To chase someone or something is to follow them in order to catch them.

meaning: To disappoint is to make one feel sad or unsatisfied.

meaning: To dive is to jump into water.

meaning: To exchange means to give something for another thing in return.

meaning: A favor is something you do for someone to help them.

meaning: A guy is an informal way to call a man.

meaning: If people or things are lovely, they are good-looking or beautiful.

meaning: A mood is the way someone is feeling.

meaning: A palace is a very large building. It is often the home of a royal family.

meaning: To permit something is to let someone do it.
example: I was sick, so my mother permitted me to stay home from school.

meaning: To protest something is to argue about it with someone.

meaning: A sculpture is a piece of art that is made from wood, clay, or stone.
example: We saw an old sculpture of Buddha at the museum.

meaning: A tribe is a group of people who live in the same culture.
example: There’s a small tribe of people who live in the mountains of Spain.

meaning: Youth is a time in people’s lives when they are young.
example: My mother wanted to be a nurse in her youth.

meaning: A cage is something that holds an animal so it cannot leave.

meaning: A colleague is somebody you work with.

meaning: To depress someone is to make them sad.

meaning: When something is factual, it is true.

meaning: To fascinate someone is to make them really like something.

meaning: A mission is an important job that is sometimes far away.

meaning: An occupation is a person’s job.
example: My father’s occupation is a dentist.

meaning: If you go overseas, you go to a country on the other side of an ocean.

meaning: To persuade someone is to make them agree to do something.

meaning: A route is the way you go from one place to another.

meaning: Ruins are old buildings that are not used anymore.

meaning: A scholar is a person who studies something and knows much about it.

meaning: When someone or something is significant, they are important.

meaning: A volcano is a mountain with a hole on top where hot liquid comes out.

meaning: If something is broad, it is wide.
example: The river is very long and broad.

meaning: A bush is a plant with many thin branches. It is smaller than a tree.

meaning: If someone or something is capable of something, they can do it.

meaning: Confident means that one believes they can do something without failing.
example: She was confident she could climb the mountain due to her training.

meaning: Delight is a feeling of being very happy with something.

meaning: The edge of something is the part of it that is farthest from the center.

meaning: A path is a way from one place to another that people can walk along.

meaning: To resort to something is to depend on it in order to solve a problem.

meaning: A shadow is the dark area that is made when something blocks light.

meaning: To succeed is to complete something that you planned or tried to do.
example: He will continue to work on the robot until he succeeds.

meaning: To suspect something is to believe that it is true.

meaning: A valley is a low area of land between two mountains or hills.

meaning: To admire someone is to like them for what they do.

meaning: To aid someone is to help them when they need something.

meaning: To attempt something is to try to do that thing.

meaning: Authority is the power that someone has because of their position.

meaning: A capital is an important city where a country’s leaders live and work.

meaning: To cooperate is to work together to do something.
example: The students cooperated to clean up the classroom.

meaning: To defend someone or something is to protect them from attack.

meaning: Destruction is damage to something so bad that it can’t be fixed.

meaning: To have plenty of something is to have more than you need.

meaning: To relieve someone is to make them feel less pain.

meaning: Reputation is the opinion that people have about someone.

meaning: Royal describes something that belongs to a king or queen.

meaning: A slave is a person who is not free and must work for someone else.

meaning: To struggle is to fight against someone or something.

meaning: When someone is stupid, they lack intelligence.

meaning: A citizen is someone who lives in a certain town or city.

meaning: A council is a group of people who run a city or town.

meaning: To declare is to say something officially.

meaning: When people or things are enormous, they are very large.
example: My dog looks enormous next to yours.

meaning: When someone or something are extraordinary, they are amazing.
example: The fireman who rescued the girl was extraordinary.

meaning: Fog is a thick cloud that is near the ground or water.

meaning: A funeral is a ceremony that takes place after a person dies.

meaning: When people or things are giant, they are very big.

meaning: An impression is the way of thinking about someone or something.

meaning: Income is how much money a person or business makes.
example: Her company pays her a fairly good income.

meaning: When someone is mad, they are angry.
example: Mother got mad when I didn’t listen to her.

meaning: If someone ought to do something, then it is the right thing to do.

meaning: To resist something is to fight against it.
example: He resisted the treatment at the hospital.

meaning: To reveal is to show something.

meaning: A sword is a long sharp weapon.

meaning: A tale is a story.

meaning: To trap people or animals is to capture them so they cannot get away.

meaning: When people are violent, they want to hurt someone.

meaning: Admission is the act of allowing to enter a place.

meaning: Astronomy is the study of the stars and planets.
example: Harold loved watching the stars, so he decided to study astronomy.

meaning: To blame someone for something bad is to say they did it.
example: My mom blamed me for something I didn’t do.

meaning: Chemistry the study of and reaction to substances.
example: In chemistry class, the professor taught us about chemical reactions.

meaning: If something happens despite what you do, it happens anyway.
example: We still played the game despite the cold weather.

meaning: A dinosaur is a very big animal that lived millions of years ago.
example: I like to see the dinosaur bones at the museum.

meaning: An exhibit is a display of interesting things.
example: There was an animal exhibit at the fair.

meaning: Fame is reputation one has gained among the public.
example: He had fame and fortune, but he was not happy.

meaning: A forecast is an idea about what the weather will be like in the future.
example: The forecast says that it will rain all week.

meaning: A genius is a very smart person.
example: Since she was a genius, she easily passed all of her school exams.

meaning: Someone who is gentle is kind and calm.
example: He is very gentle with the baby.

meaning: Geography is the study of where things are.
example: I had to draw a map for geography class.

meaning: To interfere is to cause problems and keep something from happening.
example: My little sister always interferes when I’m trying to study.

meaning: To do something lightly is to not push very hard.
example: Draw lightly so you do not tear your paper.

meaning: A principal is a person in charge of a school.
example: My school’s principal can be very strict with the rules.

meaning: A row is a line of things.
example: James put all of his toy soldiers into neat rows.

meaning: A shelf is a place on a wall where you put things.
example: I keep my clothes on a shelf in my closet.

meaning: If you do something out of spite, you want to be mean.
example: He snuck into his sister’s room and stole her bag out of spite.

meaning: Super means really good.
example: My dad said I did a super Job cleaning the house.

meaning: If something is wet, it has water on it.
example: Since my dog was wet, he tried to shake all the water off his body.

meaning: To abuse someone or something means to hurt them on purpose.
example: The mean man abused his dog when it barked too loudly.

meaning: To afford something means you have enough money to pay for it.
example: I’ve been saving my money, so I can afford to buy a new bike.

meaning: To bake means to cook food with heat.
example: My sister is a good cook. She bakes delicious cakes.

meaning: A bean is a plant seed that is good to eat.
example: There are many different kinds of beans to eat.

meaning: A candle is a stick of wax that is lit on fire for light or heat.
example: When the lights went out, we lit some candles.

meaning: To convert something means to change it into something else.
example: The man converted his messy field into a garden of flowers.

meaning: A debt is an amount of money that a person owes.
example: I have not paid my gas bill. I owe a debt to the gas company.

meaning: To decrease something is to make it less than it was before.
example: Hiring more police officers has decreased crime in the city.

meaning: A fault is a mistake.
example: It is my fault that the cat ran away. I left the door open.

meaning: A fund is an amount of money that people have.
example: We all put money into our club’s fund.

meaning: When someone is generous, they like to give things to people.
example: The generous man donated several new computers to our school.

meaning: An ingredient is something that is part of a food dish.
example: The main ingredients in cake are eggs, sugar and flour.

meaning: To insist means to be firm in telling people what to do.
example: I insist that you try some of these cookies.

meaning: A mess is a condition that is not clean or neat.
example: Heather’s room was a complete mess.

meaning: Metal is a strong material people use to build things.
example: Steel is a common metal that is used to build buildings.

meaning: To monitor people or things is to watch them closely.
example: The teacher monitors the students when they take tests.

meaning: To oppose something means to dislike it or act against it.
example: I want to be a police officer because I oppose crime.

meaning: If a person is passive, they do not take action to solve problems.
example: Marcie is so passive that she never solves her own problems.

meaning: A quantity is a certain amount of something.
example: I have a small quantity of milk in my glass.

meaning: To sue someone is to take them to court for something wrong they did.
example: I sued the company after I slipped on a banana peel in their hallway.

meaning: When someone has anxiety, they have a lot of worries and fear.
example: When I have to climb to high places, I’m filled with anxiety.

meaning: An army is a large group of people who fight in wars.
example: The army protects all the people in the country.

meaning: A billion is a very large number: 1,000,000,000.
example: There are billions of stars in outer space.

meaning: To carve means to cut into something.
example: My father usually carves the turkey for Thanksgiving.

meaning: To consult someone means to ask them for help.
example: I will consult my accountant to find a way to pay for my bills.

meaning: An emergency is a time when someone needs help right away.
example: There is a huge fire in my house! This is an emergency!

meaning: When someone has good fortune, it means they have luck.
example: I have good fortune when I play cards.

meaning: To guarantee means to know something will happen.
example: I guarantee that the sun will come up in the morning.

meaning: To hike means to walk in the mountains or forest.
example: I always bring plenty of equipment with me when I hike.

meaning: When something is initial, it is the first thing.

meaning: If something is intense, it is very strong.
example: The skunk made an intense odor that filled the air.

meaning: To lend something is to give it to someone for a short time.
example: My sister lost her pen, so I will lend her mine.

meaning: The peak is the very top of a mountain.
example: There is snow on the peaks of those mountains.

meaning: Potential means capable of being but not yet in existence.
example: I’ve thought of some potential problems with your idea.

meaning: When you have pride, you are happy with yourself.
example: I take pride in getting good grades.

meaning: Proof is a fact that shows something is real.
example: They used his fingerprint as proof for the crime he committed.

meaning: To quit something means to stop doing it.
example: I quit running because I got tired.

meaning: To spin is to turn around in circles.
example: The boy kept spinning until he fell down.

meaning: When people or things are tiny, they are very small.
example: A baby’s hand is tiny.

meaning: A tutor is someone who gives lessons in a certain subject.
example: My sister is bad at math. So my mother hired a tutor to help her.

meaning: If something is apparent, it is easy to see.
example: Her happiness was apparent from the smile on her face.

meaning: When people are blind, they cannot see.
example: The blind man didn’t see the hole and almost fell in.

meaning: To calculate is to find an answer using math.
example: I calculated how much money I would need to buy the car.

meaning: To chat is to talk with someone.
example: Even though they were far apart, the couple chatted every day.

meaning: To commit to something is to promise to do it.
example: Seth wanted to go home, but he had committed to finishing the job.

meaning: To compose something is to make it from smaller parts.
example: Tonya composed her report using many sources of information.

meaning: A dormitory is a school building where students live.
example: I will move into the dormitory at the beginning of the school year.

meaning: To exhaust someone is to make them tired.
example: John exhausted himself by swimming all day.

meaning: A greenhouse is a small glass building that is used to grow plants.
example: We have a small greenhouse in our backyard where we grow plants.

meaning: To ignore something is to act like you do not see or hear it.
example: I ignored the message he was making and kept studying.

meaning: If something is obvious, it is clear and easily seen.
example: It was obvious that he was tired. He kept falling asleep.

meaning: Physics is a science that deals with energy and how it affects things.
example: In physics class, we used Newton’s Cradle to learn about energy.

meaning: A portion of something is a part of it.
example: I only ate a small portion of the pizza.

meaning: To remind someone is to tell them to remember to do something.
example: Nick’s dad reminded him to do his homework.

meaning: A secretary is a person who works in an office.

meaning: If something is severe, it is very bad or serious.

meaning: If someone has a talent, they are naturally able to do it well.
example: Maria has a talent for playing the piano.

meaning: A thesis is an idea that needs to be proved.
example: She did not support her thesis very well.

meaning: A uniform is a piece of clothing worn by people of the same group.
example: All the members of our marching band wear matching uniforms.

meaning: Vision is the act of seeing.
example: The eye doctor tested my vision.

meaning: To absorb a liquid means to take it inside.
example: He used a sponge to absorb the water on the floor.

meaning: A boss is a person in charge of other people at work.
example: My boss is a nice person.

meaning: A committee is a group of people who meet together to make decisions.
example: The school’s committee agreed on a new dress code for students.

meaning: A contract is a written agreement between two people.
example: The woman signed a contract when she bought the house.

meaning: A crew is a group of workers.
example: My father has a crew. They help him build houses.

meaning: To devote time to something means to spend a lot of time doing it.
example: She devotes two hours a day to playing the piano.

meaning: To dig is to make a hole in the ground.

meaning: To dine means to eat dinner.

meaning: To donate is to give something to a charity or organization.

meaning: If something is double, it is twice as much, or twice as many.
example: I paid almost double the amount for that shirt.

meaning: To elevate something is to put it at a higher level.
example: The man elevated the picture so he could see it better.

meaning: A flavor is the taste of food or drinks.
example: The flavor of the ice cream was very good.

meaning: A foundation is a group that provides money for research.
example: The foundation raised money to give scholarships to students.

meaning: A generation is a group of people who live at the same time.
example: My grandparents are from a different generation than me.

meaning: A handle is the part of an object people hold while using it.
example: The pot is very hot. So pick it up by the handle.

meaning: A layer covers over something or is between two things.

meaning: Mud is soft, wet dirt.

meaning: If something is smooth, it has no bumps.
example: The baby’s skin felt very smooth.

meaning: Soil is the top layer of land on the Earth.

meaning: If people or things are unique, they are not like the others.
example: Her dog is unique. I’ve never seen one quite like it.

meaning: A chamber is an old word for a bedroom.
example: The girl was tired. She went to her chamber fora nap.

meaning: To deny something is to say it is not true.

meaning: A document is an official piece of writing.

meaning: To emphasize is to give importance or attention to something.

meaning: A fever is a high body temperature that people get when they are sick.
example: Lydia had a high fever so she didn’t go to school.

meaning: The flu is a type of sickness that makes you feel weak or your body hurt.
example: Since he had the flu, he felt miserable.

meaning: To freeze is to become very cold.
example: If you don’t wear your coat in winter, you will freeze.

meaning: A gesture is a movement of the hands or body.

meaning: To interrupt is to briefly stop someone when they are doing something.

meaning: To last is to continue or go on for an amount of time.

meaning: A perspective is the way you think about something.

meaning: When something is rational, it is normal or practical.

meaning: To recover is to go back to normal after something bad happens.
example: I hope the city will recover soon after the flood.

meaning: To rely on something or someone is to trust or depend on them.
example: The boy relied on his older brother to help him.

meaning: To shock people is to surprise them.
example: The man was shocked by the news.

meaning: When people are shy, they are nervous around people strange to them.
example: The girl was too shy to try out for the play.

meaning: To stare at something is to look at it for a long time.
example: The young couple stared into each other’s eyes.

meaning: Thus means as a result or for that reason.

meaning: An aim is a goal someone wants to make happen.

meaning: To attach is to put two things together.

meaning: To bet is to risk money on the result of a game or a business.

meaning: A carriage is a vehicle pulled by a horse.
example: We took a carriage ride in the park.

meaning: If something is classic, it is typical.

meaning: To commute is to travel a long distance to get to work.
example: I usually commute to work on the train.

meaning: To confirm is to make sure something is correct.
example: Winning the game confirmed that James was a good player.

meaning: To criticize is to say you do not like someone or something.

meaning: To differ is to not be the same as another person or thing.

meaning: An expense is the money that people spend on something.
example: She wrote down all the expenses for her trip.

meaning: If something is formal, it is done in an official way.
example: It was a formal dinner, so we wore our best clothes.

meaning: Height is how tall someone or something is.
example: My height is 168 centimeters.

meaning: To invent something is to create something that never existed before.

meaning: If someone is junior in their job, they do not have a lot of power.

meaning: Labor is the act of doing or making something.
example: Building the house took a lot of labor.

meaning: A mechanic is someone who fixes vehicles or machines.
example: We took the car to the mechanic to be fixed.

meaning: If something is prime, it is the most important one.
example: Dirty air is a prime cause of illness.

meaning: To shift to something is to move into a new place or direction.
example: He shifted to the other side of the table to eat his breakfast.

meaning: A signal is a sound or action that tells someone to do something.
example: The coach blew his whistle as a signal to begin the game.

meaning: When people are sincere, they tell the truth.
example: He sounded sincere when he apologized to me.

meaning: Ability is the quality of a person being able to do something well.
example: His swimming abilities let him cross the entire lake.

meaning: Agriculture is the growing of food and animals.
example: The farmer studied agriculture in college.

meaning: A cartoon is a funny drawing.
example: Sometimes, people draw cartoons for the newspaper.

meaning: The ceiling is the top of a room.
example: He painted the ceiling with a special roller.

meaning: To convince someone means to make them sure of something.
example: She convinced me to buy the house.

meaning: When you are curious about something, you want to know more about it.
example: I opened up the clock because I was curious about how it worked.

meaning: To delay means to wait to do something.
example: I was delayed at the airport for over two hours.

meaning: An element of something is a particular part of it.

meaning: When people have faith in something, they believe in it and trust it.

meaning: Grain is food crops such as wheat, corn, rice or oats.
example: The farmer planted two fields of grain this year.

meaning: To greet someone means to meet and welcome them.
example: When my friend came over, I greeted him at the door.

meaning: To investigate means to search for something or learn about it.

meaning: Joy is a feeling you get when you are really happy.

meaning: A label is a tag that tells about something.

meaning: A monk is a religious person who lives a simple life.

meaning: When something is odd, it is unusual.

meaning: To pause means to stop doing something for a while.

meaning: A priest is a person trained to perform religious duties.

meaning: A profession is a person’s job.

meaning: A costume is a set of clothes people wear for a particular occasion.

meaning: To extend is to stretch out or reach.

meaning: A fool is someone who makes unwise choices.

meaning: To forbid is to tell someone they cannot do something.

meaning: To illustrate is to show something by drawing a picture.

meaning: A nest is a place where a bird lays its eggs.

meaning: Silence is complete quiet.

meaning: A stream is a small river.

meaning: An instant is a very short amount of time.

meaning: A person’s rank is their place in an order of people.

meaning: Recognition is getting praise from other people.

meaning: To refrigerate something means to make it cold.

example: My father is sixty-five years old. He is about to retire from work.

meaning: A statistic is a number that tells a fact about something.

meaning: An astronaut is a person that goes into outer space.

meaning: When you are awake, you are not asleep.

meaning: When you have courage, you are not afraid.
example: The man had the courage to touch the lion.

meaning: To float is to move on top of water without sinking.
example: The boy’s toy boat floated in the pool.

meaning: To grant something is to allow someone to have it.

meaning: Gravity is the force that makes things fall to Earth.
example: There is no gravity in space.

meaning: A jewel is a beautiful stone that is worth a lot of money.
example: A diamond is one of the most expensive jewels in the world.

meaning: A miner is a person who works in a mine.
example: The miner was looking for gold.

meaning: A mineral is a type of substance found in the Earth.
example: Rocks are made up of different kinds of minerals.

meaning: To participate is to take part in something.

meaning: A satellite is something that is sent into space to get information.

meaning: The scale of something is its size, especially when it is very large.

meaning: To skip something is to not do it.

meaning: To stretch is to make your arms or legs reach out.

meaning: When something is underground, it is below the surface of the Earth.

meaning: An alarm is something that warns people of danger.

meaning: An award is a prize someone gets for doing something well.

meaning: A breed is a group of animals within a species.

meaning: A bucket is a round containerto put things in.

meaning: A contest is a game or a race.

meaning: To convict someone means to prove that they did a bad thing.

meaning: A garage is the part of a house where people put their cars.

meaning: A pup is a young dog.

meaning: To repair something is to fix it.

meaning: A tissue is a soft piece of paper people use to wipe their noses.

meaning: A yard is the ground just outside of a person’s house.

example: People often think my sister and I look alike.

meaning: Architecture is the style or way a building is made.

meaning: A stock is a stored amount of something.

meaning: A flag is a piece of colored cloth that represents something.

meaning: A stake is a small, sharp piece of wood or metal that is put into the ground.
example: We marked our property by placing stakes into the ground.

meaning: A steward is a person like a waiter who serves food on planes and ships.
example: The steward is bringing some tea.

meaning: String is a thin piece of fabric or rope.
example: I found a large ball of string.

meaning: A thorn is a sharp part of a plant.
example: Be careful of the thorns when you pick the roses!

meaning: To wreck something means to destroy or ruin it.
example: The teenagers wrecked the house for no reason at all.

meaning: To admonish someone is to tell them you disapprove of their behavior.
example: The teacher admonished Mark because he was chewing gum in class.

meaning: If something is audible, then it is able to be heard.
example: The sound of the drums was audible from miles away.

meaning: If something or someone is awesome, they are impressive or frightening.
example: The huge military plane was an awesome sight.

meaning: To beware means to be careful of something or someone that is dangerous.
example: You should beware of driving fast on wet roads.

meaning: To brag means to talk of one’s abilities or achievements in a proud way.
example: He had strong muscles and bragged about it to the entire class.

meaning: If someone is conscious of something, then they are aware of it.
example: The new student was conscious of the other students staring at her.

meaning: To disagree with someone means to have a different opinion from them.
example: The lawyers disagreed about the best way to settle the case.

meaning: To echo means that a sound repeats itself because it bounced off an object.
example: The child yelled over the canyon, and the wall echoed the sound.

meaning: If something is eventual, it will happen at the end of a series of events.
example: The constant training and planning led the team to an eventual victory.

meaning: A hint is information that suggests something will happen or is true.
example: I quietly passed on a hint to my sister about the test.

meaning: An idiot is a person who is not smart or who has done something silly.
example: Because he got lost in the forest, the man felt like an idiot.

meaning: If something is immense, it is very large.
example: An immense amount of money was needed to buy such a large boat.

meaning: If something is indirect, then it is not the easiest or straightest way.
example: He chose to take the most indirect route to the coast.

meaning: An option is a choice between two or more things.
example: The children were given the option of three houses to pick from.

meaning: A pastime is an activity done for fun that you do often.
example: In the US, baseball is considered the national pastime.

meaning: If something is perfect, then it is without any mistakes.
example: She got all the questions right, so her score was perfect.

meaning: To pinpoint something means to locate it exactly.
example: The navigation system in my car is able to pinpoint my exact location.

meaning: To switch means to change something to something else.
example: Mom switched the TV station from the news to her favorite show.

meaning: If something or someone is thorough, then they are complete in every way.
example: Tina did a thorough job of cleaning the stains out of the carpet.

meaning: To torment someone means to cause them to suffer on purpose.
example: She tormented her little brother by taking his favorite toy.

meaning: A beak is the hard curved part of a bird’s mouth.
example: The bird used her beak to dig a small hole in the ground.

meaning: If something is damp, it is somewhat wet.
example: My hair is still damp from my shower.

meaning: To disapprove of something is to think that it is wrong.
example: Alex, disapproved of his son’s behavior.

meaning: You use except to talk about the only thing that a statement does not apply to.
example: Everyone had fun on the trip except Jim, who felt ill the whole time.

meaning: A flight is an act of flying, often in an airplane.
example: The airplane made a flight around the world.

meaning: When someone is fond of something, they like it.
example: I am very fond of chocolate cake.

meaning: When something or someone is immoral, they are evil or do bad things.
example: Stealing money from one’s mother is an immoral act.

meaning: Ivy is a plant with long vines that grows upward typically on walls.
example: The walls of the castle are covered with ivy.

meaning: To moan is to make a low sound when feeling pain or sadness.
example: The sick man moaned from his bed.

meaning: If someone is oblivious of something, they are unaware of it.
example: I was late to school because I was oblivious of the time.

meaning: To perish means to die, usually because of bad conditions or bad events.
example: Many people perish in wars.

meaning: A pit is a big hole in the ground.
example: Michael fell into the pit and needed some help to get out.

meaning: The rim is the outside edge of a round thing, like a cup or bottle.
example: I put my lips to the rim of the bottle and took a drink.

meaning: A roost is a place where birds can land and rest or sleep.
example: The family of doves made a roost at the top of the tree.

meaning: If something is slippery, it is wet or smooth and causes people to slip.
example: The repairman fell down on the floor because it was too slippery.

meaning: To soar means to fly high in the air.
example: As the sun rose, two eagles soared through the sky.

meaning: If something is trivial, it is not important or meaningful.
example: Television is trivial, but learning to read is very important.

meaning: If something is typical, it is normal for a certain type of thing.
example: Barking is typical behavior for dogs.

meaning: If something is utterly a way, it is completely that way.
example: When the sun was blocked by the moon, it was utterly dark outside.

meaning: To weep means to cry.
example: My sister told me the dramatic movie would make me weep.

meaning: If you do something awhile, you do it for a short time.
example: Wait here awhile, and I’ll bring some tea.

meaning: Cyberspace is the imaginary place of the Internet where activities occur.
example: I didn’t receive your email. It probably got lost in cyberspace.

meaning: To edit means to correct a piece of writing so that it is suitable to be published.
example: She asked her brother to edit her paper before she submitted it to her teacher.

meaning: An essay is a short piece of writing on a certain subject.
example: She had to write a two-page essay for her English class.

meaning: To evaluate something means to study it, so a decision can be made.
example: Joe and Ken evaluated the plan and agreed that it would work.

meaning: To faint means to go unconscious and fall down.
example: Carol fainted because she hadn’t eaten in over a day.

meaning: If something is global, it happens all around the world.
example: Pollution is a global problem.

meaning: A gymnasium is a building with equipment that you can use to get exercise.
example: When I go to the gymnasium, I use the treadmill for 20 minutes.

meaning: To highlight something means to mark it with a color so that it is easy to see.
example: I read my vocabulary list and highlighted the most difficult words.

meaning: If someone is ignorant about something, they have no knowledge about it.
example: I’m a bit ignorant about his theories. Can you explain them to me?

meaning: An index is a list of words at the end of a book that gives information.
example: If you look in the index, you’ll find the right page number.

meaning: A lecture is a long, educational speech.
example: His lecture on world hunger was very informative.

meaning: A moral is a message at the end of a story that teaches you something.
example: At the end of the story, Mother explained the moral to the children.

meaning: To operate means to work or function.
example: I’m sorry, but the trains are not operating today.

meaning: If something is private, it is only used by one person or group.
example: Don’t look at my diary! It’s private!

meaning: When something is recent, it happened a short time ago.
example: I did not know what caused his recent behavior.

meaning: A resolution is a personal decision.
example: At New Year, I made a list of resolutions to help me have a better year.

meaning: A semester is a portion of a school year.
example: Jack is in his second semester of college.

meaning: If something is typewritten, it is written on a computer or typewriter.
example: This is an important, formal project and must be typewritten.

meaning: When something is weird, it is very strange.
example: My best friend’s dad is a bit weird.

meaning: If something is absolute, it is total or complete.
example: My presentation was an absolute disaster! It was terrible!

meaning: Alas is a word that people say when something bad happens.
example: I looked everywhere for my purse, but alas, I couldn’t find it.

meaning: If you are attentive, you are careful and you pay attention.
example: He is a good student because he is attentive to every detail on his work.

meaning: A cape is a large cloth that covers one’s back and is tied around the neck.
example: The superhero wore a long red cape.

meaning: To envision something means to imagine that it may happen.
example: I can envision my mom’s face when I give her this present!

meaning: When something happens evenly, it happens at the same rate or level.
example: The food was handed out evenly among the hungry people.

meaning: Folk are common or average people.
example: I’ve invited all the folks from our street to a gathering at my place.

meaning: To melt means to turn from a solid to a liquid.
example: The snowman that we made yesterday melted in the sun.

meaning: A patch is a part of a surface that is different in appearance from the rest.
example: There was one small patch of grass in the sand-covered desert.

meaning: Pleasure is a feeling of happiness.
example: The student smiled with pleasure when she received the prize.

meaning: A pop is a short, loud sound.
example: I heard a loud pop; then my computer screen shattered.

meaning: A pudding is a sweet dessert.
example: Would you like some chocolate pudding and coffee for dessert?

meaning: A rail is a horizontal bar made of metal or wood.
example: The cat was sitting on the rail of the fence.

meaning: A recipe is a set of instructions to make food.
example: The apple cake that you made is really tasty. Can I have the recipe, please?

meaning: A role is the normal purpose or function of a person or thing.
example: My role at work is to check the quality of the products.

meaning: To shrink means to get smaller.
example: If you stick to a healthy diet, your stomach will shrink!

meaning: To soak something means to make it very wet.

meaning: A spark is a small, quick flash of fire.

meaning: A spirit is someone’s feelings and personality, but not a physical body part.
example: He has a very outgoing spirit. He can make friends with anyone.

meaning: A suit is a set of clothes. It usually includes a jacket with pants or a skirt.
example: I wore my new suit on my date with Melissa.

meaning: An account with a bank is an arrangement to keep one’s money there.
example: After I paid for the new car, my bank account was nearly empty.

meaning: An architect is a person who designs buildings.
example: The plans for building the new home were drawn by a famous architect.

meaning: To conceal something means to hide it.
example: You should conceal your money so no one can take it from you.

meaning: A crime is something bad that a person does that can be punished by law.
example: Police quickly arrived at the scene of the crime.

meaning: A deed is a certificate that proves that someone owns something.
example: When she bought the car, she was given a deed to show the car was hers.

meaning: Gratitude is a feeling of being thankful.
example: The kids showed Aunt Tess much gratitude for visiting them.

meaning: A habitat is the natural home of animals or plants.
example: Frogs are often found in a wet habitat, such as near a lake, river, or pond.

meaning: To intervene means to help stop a problem between two people or groups.
example: The students argued until the teacher intervened.

meaning: A landmark is an object that helps people find or remember a location.
example: The tall tree was used as a landmark for people to find the road to the inn.

meaning: If something is legal, it is related to the law or allowed by the law.
example: It was not legal for him to drive until he was eighteen years old.

meaning: If something is memorable, then it is remembered for a special reason.
example: The party was memorable; people were still talking about it years later.

meaning: To oblige someone means to require them to do something.
example: If I wanted to have playtime, I was obliged to clean my room once a week.

meaning: To proclaim something means to say it in public.
example: The army general proclaimed that the war was won.

meaning: A rally is a large public meeting in order to support something.
example: The school had a rally in the gym to support the basketball team.

meaning: To resolve something means to find a solution.
example: She resolved the problem with her children by giving them both a toy.

meaning: Resources are a person or country’s money and materials that they can use.
example: The poor man didn’t have the resources to feed himself.

meaning: A sentence is punishment given to someone who didn’t follow the law.
example: The sentence for stealing a car is much worse than for stealing candy.

meaning: To volunteer means to offer to do something for free.
example: Many people volunteered to help the adults learn to read.

meaning: A witness is someone who sees or hears a crime or accident happen.
example: The woman was the only witness of the horrible crime.

meaning: Access is the right to enter or use something.
example: The manager was the only person with access to the password.

meaning: Conduct is the way that someone acts.
example: She was punished for her bad conduct.

meaning: When an event or action is constant, it happens a lot or all the time.
example: The television at home is in constant use.

meaning: A crack is a narrow space between the parts of something broken.
example: The old window was covered with cracks.

meaning: A device is an object or a machine.
example: A thermometer is a device that tells temperature.

meaning: To enclose something is to contain it.
example: The cows in the field were enclosed by a fence.

meaning: To grip something is to hold it very tightly.
example: I was scared, so I gripped my older sister’s hand.

meaning: To halt is to stop moving.
example: The criminal halted when he saw the police coming.

meaning: If something is impending, it is going to happen soon.
example: The student was nervous about his impending test.

meaning: To influence someone or something is to have an effect over them.
example: My friend influenced my decision to attend Terrance University.

meaning: A law is a rule made by the legislative body.
example: The students learned about different laws during social studies class.

meaning: A mode is a setting or condition on a machine.
example: Mother turned the TV to quiet mode while she talked on the phone.

meaning: To perspire means to sweat.
example: I usually perspire a lot when I am at practice.

meaning: To replace something is to put it in the place of something else.
example: I replaced the tire on my car because it was flat.

meaning: To snap something means to break it suddenly, which causes a loud noise.
example: I took the stick and snapped it with my hands.

meaning: If a person or animal is sly, they are sneaky or good at tricking people.
example: The sly fox stole the eggs from the nest.

meaning: To tend to do something is to be likely to do it or to do it often.
example: My mom tends to buy me the perfect gift each Christmas.

meaning: When something is valid, it is correct or based on good reasoning.
example: The expert’s opinion on the subject was more valid than others.

meaning: A version is an account of something that differs slightly from the original.
example: She read the students British version of the Chinese fairy tale.

meaning: You use whatsoever after a noun to emphasize that there is nothing of that thing.
example: The boy had no idea whatsoever how to solve the story problem.

meaning: If something is alongside another thing, then it is next to it.
example: We work alongside each other in the office.

meaning: Your appetite is your hunger for food.
example: Tom has a big appetite. He eats all the time.

meaning: To assist someone is to help them.
example: Andrew assisted me with my homework.

meaning: A breeze is a soft wind.
example: The breeze caused the leaves to fall off the tree.

meaning: To defy someone is to work against them or refuse to do what they say.
example: The students got into trouble for defying their teacher’s rules.

meaning: To display something is to show it, especially by putting it in a certain place.
example: The museum displayed many wonderful paintings.

meaning: If something or someone is efficient, they do not waste energy.
example: My car is very efficient. I rarely have to buy gas.

meaning: If someone is feeble, they are small or weak.
example: The boy was too feeble to carry the object very far.

meaning: To forgive someone is to stop being angry with them.
example: Sandra forgave Peter after he said he was sorry.

meaning: If someone is lively, they have a lot of energy.
example: Jennifer is very lively: she’s always running and playing.

meaning: If something is majestic, it is large and beautiful.
example: The rich people lived in a big, majestic house.

meaning: You use nor to connect two negative ideas.
example: I eat neither apples nor oranges. I don’t like either one.

meaning: If someone is outraged, they are very angry.
example: My father was outraged when he saw that I had crashed his car.

meaning: If someone is pessimistic, they believe that the worst will happen.
example: John is pessimistic. He always thinks something bad will happen.

meaning: To slap someone means to hit them with the palm of the hand.
example: Out of anger, Helen slapped Eunice on the face.

meaning: To smash something is to break it into many small pieces.
example: Jacob smashed the window with a rock.

meaning: A subject is the topic that is being discussed or taught.
example: The subject of Marco’s speech was the economy.

meaning: A wage is the money that a person gets for doing a job.
example: The wages I receive from my job are really great!

meaning: You use whereas to show how two things are different.
example: My sister loves horror movies, whereas I prefer comedies.

meaning: When something is animate, it has life.
example: Rocks and machines are not animate things.

meaning: To classify things is to put them into groups based on their type.
example: The biologist classified the plant as a completely new species.

meaning: To concede is to admit that something is true against your wish.
example: The student conceded that he had cheated on the test.

meaning: A concept is an idea about something.
example: I learned some concepts of molecules before working in the science lab.

meaning: To construct something means to make or build it.
example: The men used wood and metal to construct a house.

meaning: A decade is a period often years.
example: She celebrated her three decades of work with the company.

meaning: A diagram is a simple drawing that explains what something is or how it works.
example: By following the diagram, I was able to put the desk together.

meaning: A ferry is a boat that carries passengers over short distances.
example: The ferry took the people across the lake.

meaning: If something is handy, it is useful.
example: An eraser is handy if you make a lot of mistakes.

meaning: To isolate is to separate one person or thing from a group.
example: The teacher isolated the bad child from the class before talking with her.

meaning: A longing is a strong feeling of wanting.
example: Since he skipped breakfast, he had a longing for food all morning.

meaning: If something is numerous, there are many of those things.
example: It was hard to drive fast since there were numerous holes in the road.

meaning: A particle is a very small piece of something.
example: The bottles of wine were covered in a layer of dust particles.

meaning: A plea is a request that is urgent or emotional.
example: The poor, hungry man made a plea for food.

meaning: To refrain from something is to avoid doing it.
example: The doctor asked Mary to refrain from eating fast food as part of her diet.

meaning: A review of something is a formal inspection of it by people in authority.
example: The government ordered a careful review of the economic situation.

meaning: If someone is sophisticated, they know many things about the world.
example: Jake is one of the most sophisticated persons I’ve ever met.

meaning: To surrender something is to give it up.
example: The thief surrendered the money to the police when he was caught.

meaning: If something is upright, it is standing up straight.

meaning: If something is worthwhile, it is important or useful.
example: On his visit to Canada, he realized studying English was worthwhile.

meaning: An alliance is a group of people who work together.
example: The junior executives formed an alliance with each other.

meaning: Applause is the noise made when people clap hands to show approval.
example: At the end of his speech, everyone gave applause.

meaning: If you are armed, you are carrying a weapon.
example: The robber was armed with a gun.

meaning: If something is authoritative, it uses the best information available.

meaning: A ceremony is an event that happens on special occasions.

meaning: Culture is the music, art, and writings of a certain place or group of people.

meaning: A defense is something that is done to protect another thing.

meaning: A detail is a small piece of information.

meaning: When a group of things is diverse, it is made up of a wide variety of things.

meaning: To enchant someone is to make them feel very interested or happy.

meaning: To equip someone is to give them the things needed to do something.

meaning: A genre is a type of literature, art, or music characterized by its style.

meaning: An impact is the effect someone or something has on another.

meaning: To lure someone is to convince them to do something, by using a trick.

meaning: An obstacle is an object or a problem that stops you from doing something.

meaning: A shelter is a place to go that is safe from danger or bad weather.
example: The frog took shelter from the storm in a nearby cave.

meaning: To supply something means to give people what they need or want.
example: The water heater supplied the house with warm water.

meaning: If people are vain, they are only concerned with how they look.
example: Rebecca is so vain that she looks at herself in every mirror.

meaning: An alternative is something that you can choose instead of your first choice.
example: Her first plan to make extra money seemed weak, so she chose an alternative.

meaning: An avenue is a road, often a large one with buildings on each side.
example: Drive down this avenue and then turn left to go to the park.

meaning: The belly is the stomach of a person or animal.
example: His belly was full because he ate a lot of food.

meaning: A bid to do something is an attempt to do it.
example: He made a bid to become the university’s next president.

meaning: To blow means to move air or move something through the air, as in the wind.
example: The wind is blowing very hard today. We should stay inside.

meaning: A conflict is a fight between different people or groups.

meaning: A continent is one of the seven large areas of land on the Earth.
example: Asia is the largest continent.

meaning: A current is a steady and constant flow of air or water in a river or ocean.
example: The ocean currents took the ship far off into the sea.

meaning: Disrespect is rudeness or a behavior that shows a lack of respect.
example: He showed disrespect by arguing with his boss during a meeting.

meaning: Enthusiasm is a very strong good feeling about something.
example: The crowd showed their enthusiasm for the soccer team by cheering loudly.

meaning: When something is harsh, it is very unpleasant.
example: The desert can be a very harsh environment.

meaning: To lean is to bend the body in a particular direction.
example: The woman leaned against the counter because she was tired.

meaning: The meantime is the time between two events.

meaning: Mischief is behavior that is meant to trick or cause trouble for people.
example: Ben was up to mischief when he persuaded Ken to paint his face.

meaning: Muscle is a mass of tissue attached to bone that helps you move.

meaning: To rescue someone means to remove them from danger.
example: The firefighter rescued the man from the burning building.

meaning: A succession is a number of things that follow one after the other.

meaning: The terrain is the land and all of its physical features or parts.

meaning: If someone is timid, they are afraid, shy, or nervous.

meaning: Violence is forceful action that is meant to injure or kill people.

meaning: To affect someone or something is to have an influence over them.
example: The student’s poor attitude affected the other students in the class.

meaning: An autograph is the written name of a famous person.
example: Everybody wanted the movie star’s autograph.

meaning: A bead is a drop of liquid.
example: Beads of water collected outside the glass.

meaning: To brew coffee or tea means to pour hot water over it.
example: Please brew a fresh pot of coffee.

meaning: To charm someone is to please them with your personality.
example: Gail charmed everyone with her humorous stories.

meaning: A destiny is all the things that happen or will happen to a person in their life.
example: It was his destiny to become a great singer.

meaning: A horn is a device that makes a loud noise.
example: The boy honked his horn while he rode his bicycle past the house.

meaning: When someone is irritable, they become annoyed or angry very easily.
example: She is irritable when she doesn’t get enough sleep.

meaning: To lag behind is to move slowly behind other moving objects.
example: The girl on rollerblades lagged behind the little girl on the bicycle.

meaning: To maximize something means to make it the biggest in size or amount.
example: Businesses try to maximize their profits.

meaning: A nightmare is a bad or scary dream.
example: The girl was scared to go back to sleep because she had a nightmare.

meaning: When something is nutritious, it helps the body stay healthy.
example: Mangoes are one of the most nutritious fruits in the world.

meaning: Protein is a substance that is necessary for the body to grow and be strong.
example: Fish and beef are good sources of protein.

meaning: A signature is your name that you have written in your own way.
example: I put my signature at the end of the letter.

meaning: Stuff is a word used to refer to things without mentioning the things by name.
example: We gave a lot of stuff to the charity.

meaning: When something is subconscious, it is done without thinking about it.
example: Breathing is one of the subconscious things that the body does.

meaning: A van is a vehicle that is used for carrying things but is smaller than a truck.

meaning: To warn someone is to make them know of possible danger in the future.
example: The lifeguard warned people to stay away from the rough ocean.

meaning: A workout is an exercise routine that helps improve health.
example: She doesn’t do her workout on the weekends.

meaning: To zoom is to move quickly.
example: The cars zoomed along the road.

meaning: A brick is a block of hard clay that is used for building things, such as walls.

meaning: To crumble means to break or fall apart into small pieces.

meaning: Dough is a mixture of flour and water that becomes bread when baked.
example: I made heart-shaped cookies from the dough.

meaning: To express a feeling or idea means to show others how one thinks or feels.
example: The nurse expressed her sympathy for the sick patient.

meaning: A fist is a hand with fingers bent in toward the palm.

meaning: If something is flexible, then it can bend easily without breaking.

meaning: To flush means the face becomes red due to heat, illness, or emotion.
example: After the long race, the runner’s face was flushed.

meaning: To injure someone means to damage a part of their body.
example: The car crash injured two people.

meaning: A lump is a small piece of something that is solid.

meaning: A mixture is something that is made by mixing other things together.
example: The walls were built using a mixture of water, rock, and dirt.

meaning: To reconcile means to return to a friendly relationship.

meaning: To ruin something means to harm or damage it greatly.
example: Our walk in the park was ruined by the sudden rain.

meaning: To shatter something means to break it suddenly into many tiny pieces.

meaning: Shutters are wooden or metal covers in front of a window.

meaning: To sift something means to remove all the large pieces.
example: The baker sifted the flour into a large bowl.

meaning: If something is slight, then it is small or minor.

meaning: To sparkle means to shine brightly with quick flashes of light.

meaning: To sprinkle means to scatter something all over something else.

meaning: If food is stale, then it is not fresh but dry, hard, and not good to eat.
example: The cookies sat on the table so long that they became stale.

meaning: To utter a word or a sound means to say it.

meaning: You use although to say that one thing is contrasted by another.
example: Although she was late, her friends gave her a warm welcome.

meaning: To apply something means to put it on.

meaning: If something or someone is absurd, they are ridiculous.

meaning: Anemia is a blood condition that causes a person to be pale and tired.
example: When she first developed anemia, she became tired often.

meaning: The aristocracy is the highest class of people in certain societies.
example: Most members of the aristocracy were very well-fed.

meaning: An aristocrat is a person who is of the highest class in certain societies.
example: The aristocrat did not need a job because his family was wealthy.

meaning: Attire is nice or special clothing.
example: Everyone wore their best attire to the president’s daughter’s wedding.

meaning: A craze is a brief and popular activity or object.

meaning: To enlarge something means to make it bigger.
example: The classrooms were enlarged over the summer to make room for more students.

meaning: An excess is an amount of something that is more than needed or wanted.

meaning: If something is feminine, then it has qualities that are commonly related to women.

meaning: A hallmark is a unique characteristic of something.

meaning: A pad is a thick piece of soft material used to protect or clean things.

meaning: If something is predominant, then it is the most important, common or strongest.

meaning: If someone or something is reputable, then they have a good reputation.

meaning: Rouge is a red powder or cream used as makeup on the cheeks or lips.

meaning: To signify means to be a symbol of something.

meaning: To vie for something means to compete against others for it.

meaning: If something or someone is vulgar, then they are rude or lacking in style.

meaning: An attic is a room just below a house’s roof.

meaning: A chunk is a thick, solid piece of something.

meaning: A fuss is excited or annoyed behavior that is not useful in any way.

meaning: If food is gourmet, then it is nicer and more expensive than regular food.

meaning: If something happens hence, then it happens as a result of something.

meaning: A kettle is a large metal pot used for boiling liquids or cooking food.

meaning: A ministry is a government department.

meaning: If someone is outspoken, then they are not afraid to say what they think.

meaning: An altar is a table used in churches.

meaning: Arthritis is an illness causing pain and swelling in a person’s joints.

meaning: Botany is the study of plants.

meaning: Dung is solid waste material produced by animals.

meaning: If something is substantial, then it is of great importance, size, or value.

meaning: A tract is a large area of land.

meaning: A vigil is a period of watchful attention at night fora specific purpose.

meaning: If someone is weary, then they are tired.
